full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #72 (2026-06-24)

PULSE
Health: 0.5173 (C). 1058 wallets, 317 contributors. 43 memos today vs 202 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
79 reward payments, 201703 PFT distributed to 22 contributors. Top earner: rnxaDu...fUS8 (53000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 15,000 PFT. Highest: rGu432...Dcw9 (15,000 PFT). Lowest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (0 PFT). 7-day leader: rGu432...Dcw9 (15,000 PFT, avg 15,000/day over 1 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): raUWC4...TbsW (149 memos). Fastest new contributor: rHR5WT...E16F (9.0 memos/day in 3 days). 4 new wallet(s) this week. 95 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-25): 117 transactions from 20 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
